stocks.impact_theory: Tesla announced Robotaxi unveiling on April 1, boosting autonomy hype. Economic implications: accelerates EV adoption, revenue from software. Market psychology: FOMO buying post Elon X post. Historical parallels: 2020 S&P inclusion surge. Analogies: like iPhone launch for Apple; rocket fuel for EV sector.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment highly positive (80% bullish posts), web news from CNBC, Reuters confirm event. Volume spike indicates momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on event hype, target $280.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles, competition from Waymo, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz and confirmed news sources align with historical Tesla event pops.

stocks.impact_theory: Nvidia reports supply chain easing for Blackwell chips amid AI boom. Implications: lower costs, higher margins. Psychology: relieves shortage fears. Parallels: 2023 AI rally. Analogies: oil supply increase for energy stocks; bandwidth upgrade for internet firms.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive analyst upgrades, X threads on production ramp, sentiment score 0.75.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: China export bans, AI hype fade, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Solid news but supply chains volatile historically.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple Vision Pro sales disappoint, China tariffs rumor. Implications: slowed growth in wearables. Psychology: profit-taking. Parallels: 2019 AirPods peak. Analogies: like Betamax flop for VCRs; tariff wars on soybeans.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mixed X sentiment (55% bearish), Bloomberg report on sales miss.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Upcoming iPhone launch rebound, services growth.

stocks.impact_theory: Microsoft Azure AI revenue beats estimates in preview. Implications: cloud dominance. Psychology: confidence in capex. Parallels: 2022 cloud shift. Analogies: AWS 2017 boom; gold rush in AI infrastructure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Seeking Alpha, X analysts positive, high engagement.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Antitrust scrutiny, recession impact on enterprise spend.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir wins $1B DoD contract for AI platforms. Implications: govt revenue stable. Psychology: meme stock revival. Parallels: 2021 SPAC hype. Analogies: defense contractor windfalls post-9/11; viral TikTok trends.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X exploding with $PLTR calls, Yahoo Finance confirmation.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High valuation, contract delays, retail fade.

stocks.justification: High volatility due to meme status.
